item.title: Mixture of Experts with Sparse Attention
item.description: We propose a new MoE architecture combining sparse attention with expert routing, achieving SOTA on five benchmarks.

item.title: Agent Memory: Long-term Context for LLM Agents
item.description: A hierarchical memory system enabling LLM agents to recall information from conversations over months without context length limits.

item.title: Benchmark: Evaluating Code Generation Models
item.description: A new benchmark for evaluating code generation across 12 programming languages with 5000 test cases.
